meta.title: Christian Voter Scorecard
meta.description: Equipping Christians to vote confidently for candidates who put Christ first. Based on public records, official votes, and stated positions.
meta.methodology: 6 categories × 5 true/false questions each = 30 points max. Scored from public sources and official records.
meta.survey: Categories selected from a poll of 250 Christian men identifying their top political priorities.
meta.author: MOOP for U.S.M.C. Ministries

categories.label: America First
categories.description: Does this candidate prioritize American sovereignty, national interests, and constitutional governance?
questions: Opposes globalist treaties and organizations that undermine U.S. sovereignty
Supports securing the U.S. border and enforcing immigration law
Prioritizes American workers and domestic manufacturing
Opposes foreign aid that does not serve U.S. interests
Supports energy independence (oil, gas, nuclear)

categories.label: Abortion & Life
categories.description: Does this candidate protect the sanctity of human life from conception to natural death?
questions: Opposes abortion in all or most cases
Supports defunding Planned Parenthood and abortion providers
Opposes taxpayer funding of abortion (state or federal)
Supports conscience protections for pro-life healthcare workers
Opposes assisted suicide / euthanasia legislation

categories.label: Marriage & Family
categories.description: Does this candidate uphold the biblical definition of marriage and protect parental rights?
questions: Defines marriage as between one man and one woman
Opposes gender ideology in schools (pronouns, bathroom policies, curriculum)
Supports parental rights in education (opt-out, curriculum review)
Opposes drag / sexually explicit content targeting minors
Supports religious liberty protections for faith-based organizations

categories.label: Immigration
categories.description: Does this candidate support lawful immigration, border security, and enforcement of existing law?
questions: Supports physical border security (wall, barriers, technology)
Opposes sanctuary city / sanctuary state policies
Supports mandatory E-Verify for employers
Opposes amnesty or blanket citizenship for illegal immigrants
Supports deportation of criminal illegal aliens

categories.label: Christian Nationalism
categories.description: Does this candidate acknowledge America's Christian heritage and support its preservation?
questions: Acknowledges America's founding on Judeo-Christian principles
Supports public display of the Ten Commandments and religious symbols
Opposes removal of 'In God We Trust' or 'under God' from public life
Supports prayer and Bible access in public schools (voluntary)
Opposes anti-Christian discrimination in government hiring / contracts

categories.label: Self-Defense & 2A
categories.description: Does this candidate protect the God-given right to self-defense and the Second Amendment?
questions: Opposes assault weapons bans and magazine capacity limits
Supports constitutional carry / concealed carry rights
Opposes red flag laws that bypass due process
Supports Castle Doctrine / Stand Your Ground laws
Opposes gun registries and government tracking of legal gun owners

candidates.name: Chris Yakabouski
candidates.notes: Conservative Spotsylvania supervisor. Has voted consistently with conservative positions on county matters.

candidates.notes: Berkeley district supervisor. Verify positions on specific policy votes.
